title: Semantic Preservation Literals
description: The output drops a protected literal. The fixture tests whether evidentiary survival outranks stylish transformation.

inputs.protectedBaseline: When a record names EXHIBIT-42 and the 6/13 deadline, the literal markers must not evaporate just because the sentence wants to look cleaner.
inputs.maskReference: Keep the markers. Keep the date. Keep the chain short.
inputs.messageDraft: Please preserve EXHIBIT-42, the 6/13 deadline, and REF-ALPHA in the custody note.
inputs.protectedOutput: Please preserve EXHIBIT-42 and the custody note. Keep the chain short.

calibrationNotes: Protected literals should survive style transfer.
Dropped evidence markers should cap claim posture and invite restore behavior.
